text.title: ai-enabled-business-analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-enabled-business-analysis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating AI-extracted requirements as a complete and final requirements baseline without BA review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: NLP extraction misses implicit requirements that an experienced BA surfaces through follow-up questions. Agents accelerate drafting; they do not replace BA judgment. No agent-generated requirements document should enter the official baseline without BA review.

failure-mode.description: Agent boundary specification that only covers the happy path and defers escalation design to engineering.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Escalation design is a requirements concern, not an implementation detail. Engineering cannot define when the business requires human oversight — that is a BA and product owner decision.
